faqs.question: How quickly can you provide drain fly treatment in Bed-Stuy?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Bedford-Stuyvesant. Most drain fly treatments take 1-2 hours depending on the severity of the infestation and the number of affected drains in your home or business.

faqs.question: What causes drain fly infestations in Bed-Stuy buildings?
faqs.answer: Drain flies breed in the organic buildup inside drains, particularly common in Bed-Stuy's older plumbing systems. They thrive in kitchen sinks, bathroom drains, basement floor drains, and seldom-used plumbing fixtures where biofilm and decomposing matter accumulate.

faqs.question: Is your drain fly treatment safe for my Bed-Stuy brownstone or apartment?
faqs.answer: Yes, we use EPA-approved treatments that are safe for residential use, including homes with children and pets. Our methods focus on bio-enzymatic cleaners and targeted applications that eliminate breeding sites without damaging your plumbing or finishes.

faqs.question: Will drain flies come back after treatment?
faqs.answer: Our comprehensive treatment eliminates existing drain flies and their breeding sites, providing long-lasting results. We also provide prevention tips for maintaining your drains. If drain flies return within our guarantee period, we'll re-treat at no additional charge.
